name: In New York, do courts force lawyers to reveal they used AI in my filings?
description: Some NY judges mandate AI disclosure and confidentiality certifications.[3]

mainEntity.name: In New York, do courts force lawyers to reveal they used AI in my filings?

acceptedAnswer.text: Some NY judges mandate AI disclosure and confidentiality certifications.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Some New York judges require attorneys to certify no confidential info went to AI and disclose AI-assisted sections.[3] This stems from ethics opinions on maintaining confidentiality and accuracy.[3] Key factors: Check if info shared with AI is visible to providers; retain interactions for client files; hallucinations must be caught.[3] Ask your lawyer their AI protocol upfront. New York leads in AI governance for legal services.[2]
